<!-- =============== HERO ======================= -->

      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============= OUR VALUES =================== -->
<!-- ============================================ -->
<section id="pillars">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="section-eyebrow" data-i18n="valuesEyebrow">Our Foundation Values</div>
      <div class="section-arabic">قِيَمُنَا</div>
      <h2 class="section-title" data-i18n-html="valuesTitle">Built upon <em>ihsaan</em> — excellence in worship and service.</h2>
    </div>

    <div class="pillars-grid">
      <div class="pillar-card reveal">
        <div class="pillar-num">01</div>
        <h4 data-i18n="valIkhlaas">Ikhlaas (Sincerity)</h4>
        <div class="ar">الإِخْلَاص</div>
        <p data-i18n="valIkhlaasDesc">Every action undertaken purely for the sake of Allah ﷻ. No hidden motives, no shows, no expectation of worldly gain — only seeking His pleasure.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar-card reveal">
        <div class="pillar-num">02</div>
        <h4 data-i18n="valAmaanah">Amaanah (Trust)</h4>
        <div class="ar">الأَمَانَة</div>
        <p data-i18n="valAmaanahDesc">Every donation, every promise, every service handled with the highest trust. Transparency in all our works — answerable to Allah first, then to our community.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar-card reveal">
        <div class="pillar-num">03</div>
        <h4 data-i18n="valIhsaan">Ihsaan (Excellence)</h4>
        <div class="ar">الإِحْسَان</div>
        <p data-i18n="valIhsaanDesc">Doing what is good in the most beautiful way — as if you see Allah, and if you do not see Him, knowing that He sees you. This is the heart of our name.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============= FOOTER ======================= -->
<!-- ============================================ -->
<footer>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="footer-grid">

      <div class="footer-brand">
        <a href="#top" class="logo">
          <div class="logo-mark"><span>ن</span></div>
          <div class="logo-text">
            <span class="logo-name">Nuurul Ihsaan</span>
            <span class="logo-tag">Foundation</span>
          </div>
        </a>
        <p>A registered Islamic foundation in Tanzania, dedicated to charity, education, da'wah, and spiritual guidance — striving for excellence (ihsaan) in service to the ummah.</p>
        <div class="footer-arabic">نُورُ الإِحْسَانِ</div>
      </div>

      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4 data-i18n="footerNav">Navigate</h4>
        <a href="#about">About</a>
        <a href="#programs">Programs</a>
        <a href="#pillars">Values</a>
        <a href="#donate">Donate</a>
        <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
      </div>

      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4 data-i18n="footerReach">Reach Us</h4>
        <a href="#">info@nuurulihsaan.org</a>
        <a href="#">+255 XXX XXX XXX</a>
        <a href="#">Dar es Salaam, Tanzania</a>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <div class="footer-dua">جَزَاكُمُ اللَّهُ خَيْرًا</div>
      © <span id="year"></span> Nuurul Ihsaan Foundation · Built in Tanzania 🇹🇿
    </div>

  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  // ============================================
  // LOGO INJECTION (embedded base64 wallpaper)
  // ============================================
  // Image data (Pexels free + logo) — base64 embedded
  window.NI_IMAGES = {"community": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "mosque1": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "mosque2": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "classroom": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "children": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "logo": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"};
  
  const IMAGES = window.NI_IMAGES;
  
  function injectImages(){
    if (!IMAGES.mosque1) return;
    const heroBg = document.getElementById('heroBg');
    if (heroBg) heroBg.style.backgroundImage = `url('${IMAGES.mosque1}')`;
    const heroLogoImg = document.getElementById('heroLogoImg');
    if (heroLogoImg && IMAGES.logo) heroLogoImg.src = IMAGES.logo;
    const aboutBg = document.getElementById('aboutBg');
    if (aboutBg) aboutBg.style.backgroundImage = `url('${IMAGES.mosque2}')`;
    document.querySelectorAll('.donate-slide').forEach(slide => {
      const key = slide.dataset.img;
      if (IMAGES[key]) slide.style.backgroundImage = `url('${IMAGES[key]}')`;
    });
  }
  
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', injectImages);
  } else {
    injectImages();
  }
  
  // DONATE SLIDESHOW
  (function initSlideshow(){
    const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.donate-slide');
    const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.donate-dot');
    const caption = document.getElementById('donateCaption');
    if (slides.length === 0) return;
    
    const captions = {
      en: [
        "Strengthening the bonds of our Muslim community",
        "Educating the next generation in faith and knowledge",
        "Nourishing children — body, mind, and soul"
      ],
      sw: [
        "Kuimarisha uhusiano wa jamii yetu ya Waislamu",
        "Kuelimisha kizazi kijacho katika imani na elimu",
        "Kulisha watoto — mwili, akili, na roho"
      ]
    };
    
    let current = 0;
    let currentLang = 'en';
    let timer = null;
    
    function showSlide(idx){
      slides.forEach((s, i) => s.classList.toggle('active', i === idx));
      dots.forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === idx));
      if (caption) {
        caption.style.opacity = '0';
        setTimeout(() => {
          caption.textContent = captions[currentLang][idx] || captions.en[idx];
          caption.style.opacity = '1';
        }, 350);
      }
      current = idx;
    }
    
    function nextSlide(){ showSlide((current + 1) % slides.length); }
    function startTimer(){ stopTimer(); timer = setInterval(nextSlide, 5500); }
    function stopTimer(){ if (timer) { clearInterval(timer); timer = null; } }
    
    dots.forEach((d, i) => {
      d.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(i); startTimer(); });
    });
    
    const donateSection = document.getElementById('donate');
    if (donateSection) {
      donateSection.addEventListener('mouseenter', stopTimer);
      donateSection.addEventListener('mouseleave', startTimer);
    }
    
    showSlide(0);
    startTimer();
    
    window.updateSlideshowLang = function(lang){
      currentLang = lang;
      if (caption) caption.textContent = captions[lang] ? captions[lang][current] : captions.en[current];
    };
  })();

  // ============================================
  // HIJRI DATE + CLOCK
  // ============================================
  function updateHijriAndClock(){
    const now = new Date();

    // Hijri date using Intl.DateTimeFormat (Islamic calendar)
    try {
      const hijri = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-TN-u-ca-islamic', {
        day: 'numeric',
        month: 'long',
        year: 'numeric'
      }).format(now);
      const hijriEl = document.getElementById('hijriDate');
      if (hijriEl) hijriEl.textContent = hijri + ' AH';
    } catch(e){
      const hijriEl = document.getElementById('hijriDate');
      if (hijriEl) hijriEl.textContent = 'Hijri date';
    }

    // Current time (Dar es Salaam — EAT, UTC+3)
    const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-GB', {
      timeZone: 'Africa/Dar_es_Salaam',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit',
      second: '2-digit',
      hour12: false
    });
    const timeEl = document.getElementById('currentTime');
    if (timeEl) timeEl.textContent = timeStr;

    // Next prayer (approximate — based on typical Dar es Salaam prayer times)
    updateNextPrayer(now);
  }

  function updateNextPrayer(now){
    // Approximate prayer times for Dar es Salaam (varies by season)
    // For real accuracy, would connect to an API like aladhan.com
    const prayers = [
      { name: 'Fajr', hour: 5, min: 0 },
      { name: 'Dhuhr', hour: 12, min: 30 },
      { name: 'Asr', hour: 15, min: 45 },
      { name: 'Maghrib', hour: 18, min: 30 },
      { name: 'Isha', hour: 19, min: 45 }
    ];

    const currentMinutes = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();
    let nextPrayer = prayers[0]; // default to tomorrow's Fajr
    nextPrayer.tomorrow = true;

    for (const p of prayers) {
      const pMinutes = p.hour * 60 + p.min;
      if (pMinutes > currentMinutes) {
        nextPrayer = p;
        nextPrayer.tomorrow = false;
        break;
      }
    }

    const el = document.getElementById('nextPrayer');
    if (el) {
      const timeFormat = String(nextPrayer.hour).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(nextPrayer.min).padStart(2,'0');
      el.textContent = nextPrayer.name + ' ' + timeFormat;
    }
  }

  // Update every second
  updateHijriAndClock();
  setInterval(updateHijriAndClock, 1000);

  // ============================================
  // SPLASH SCREEN
  // ============================================
  (function initSplash(){
    const splash = document.getElementById('splash');
    if (!splash) return;

    let alreadySeen = false;
    try {
      const today = new Date().toDateString();
      const lastSeen = sessionStorage.getItem('niSplashDate');
      if (lastSeen === today) alreadySeen = true;
      else sessionStorage.setItem('niSplashDate', today);
    } catch(e){ alreadySeen = false; }

    if (alreadySeen) {
      splash.style.display = 'none';
      document.body.classList.remove('splash-active');
      return;
    }

    const bar = document.getElementById('splashProgress');
    const statusEl = document.getElementById('splashStatus');
    const pctEl = document.getElementById('splashPct');
    const skipBtn = document.getElementById('splashSkip');

    setTimeout(() => skipBtn.classList.add('go'), 600);

    splash.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target.closest('.splash-skip')) return;
      enterSite();
    });

    const statusFlow = [
      { pct: 25, msg: 'Bismillah' },
      { pct: 55, msg: 'Preparing' },
      { pct: 85, msg: 'Almost ready' },
      { pct: 100, msg: 'Ahlan wa sahlan' },
    ];

    let step = 0;
    const interval = 2200 / statusFlow.length;

    function advance(){
      if (step >= statusFlow.length) return;
      const target = statusFlow[step];
      bar.style.width = target.pct + '%';
      statusEl.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(() => {
        statusEl.textContent = target.msg;
        pctEl.textContent = target.pct + '%';
        statusEl.style.opacity = '1';
      }, 150);
      step++;
      setTimeout(advance, interval);
    }
    setTimeout(advance, 400);

    setTimeout(() => {
      if (!splash.classList.contains('fade-out')) enterSite();
    }, 3200);
  })();

  function enterSite(){
    const splash = document.getElementById('splash');
    if (!splash || splash.classList.contains('fade-out')) return;
    splash.classList.add('fade-out');
    document.body.classList.remove('splash-active');
    setTimeout(() => { splash.style.display = 'none'; }, 800);
  }

  // Footer year
  document.getElementById('year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

  // ============================================
  // CONTACT FORM (Formspree AJAX)
  // ============================================
  (function initContactForm(){
    const form = document.getElementById('contactForm');
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('cfSubmit');
    const successEl = document.getElementById('cfSuccess');
    const errorEl = document.getElementById('cfError');
    if (!form) return;

    form.addEventListener('submit', async function(e){
      e.preventDefault();

      // Hide previous messages
      successEl.style.display = 'none';
      errorEl.style.display = 'none';

      // Show loading state
      submitBtn.classList.add('sending');
      const originalText = submitBtn.textContent;
      const sendingText = document.documentElement.lang === 'sw' ? 'Inatuma...' : 'Sending...';
      submitBtn.textContent = sendingText;

      try {
        const formData = new FormData(form);
        const response = await fetch(form.action, {
          method: 'POST',
          body: formData,
          headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
        });

        if (response.ok) {
          // Success!
          form.reset();
          successEl.style.display = 'flex';
          successEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });

          // Hide success after 8 seconds
          setTimeout(() => {
            successEl.style.display = 'none';
          }, 8000);
        } else {
          // Server error
          errorEl.style.display = 'flex';
          errorEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        }
      } catch (err) {
        // Network error
        errorEl.style.display = 'flex';
        errorEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
      } finally {
        // Reset button
        submitBtn.classList.remove('sending');
        submitBtn.textContent = originalText;
      }
    });
  })();

  // Nav scroll
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    if (window.scrollY > 30) nav.classList.add('scrolled');
    else nav.classList.remove('scrolled');
  });

  // Drawer
  const drawer = document.getElementById('drawer');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('drawerOverlay');
  const trigger = document.getElementById('menuTrigger');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('drawerClose');

  function openDrawer(){
    drawer.classList.add('open');
    overlay.classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closeDrawer(){
    drawer.classList.remove('open');
    overlay.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
  trigger.addEventListener('click', openDrawer);
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
  overlay.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeDrawer(); });

  // Theme toggle
  const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
  themeToggle.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const theme = btn.getAttribute('data-theme');
      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);
      themeToggle.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
    });
  });

  // ============================================
  // I18N — ENGLISH ↔ KISWAHILI
  // ============================================
  const i18n = {

      formSuccessTitle: "Jazakallahu khayran!",
      formSuccessText: "Ujumbe wako umepokelewa. Tutajibu hivi karibuni, inshaAllah.",
      formErrorTitle: "Tatizo limetokea.",
      formErrorText: "Tafadhali jaribu tena au tutumie email moja kwa moja.",

      // Footer
      footerNav: "Tembelea",
      footerReach: "Wasiliana",
    }
  };

  const enBackup = new Map();

  function applyLang(lang) {
    if (lang === 'en') {
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n], [data-i18n-html]').forEach(el => {
        const backup = enBackup.get(el);
        if (backup === undefined) return;
        if (el.hasAttribute('data-i18n-html')) el.innerHTML = backup;
        else el.textContent = backup;
      });
      document.documentElement.setAttribute('lang', 'en');
      return;
    }

    const dict = i18n[lang];
    if (!dict) return;

    document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
      const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
      if (!enBackup.has(el)) enBackup.set(el, el.textContent);
      if (dict[key]) el.textContent = dict[key];
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n-html]').forEach(el => {
      const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n-html');
      if (!enBackup.has(el)) enBackup.set(el, el.innerHTML);
      if (dict[key]) el.innerHTML = dict[key];
    });
    document.documentElement.setAttribute('lang', lang === 'sw' ? 'sw' : 'en');
  }

  // Language toggle
  const langToggle = document.getElementById('langToggle');
  if (langToggle) {
    langToggle.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const lang = btn.getAttribute('data-lang');
        langToggle.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        btn.classList.add('active');
        applyLang(lang);
      });
    });
  }

  // Reveal on scroll
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(e.target); }});
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>
